tasks.prompt: Rename getUserName to get_user_name across the package and public tests. Preserve existing behavior, update every reference, and verify the change.
Use error.log to fix process so it sums every value in the input list. Preserve sensible behavior for empty and single-value lists and verify the fix.
Add a /health endpoint to the lightweight app so get('/health') returns ({'status': 'ok'}, 200). Preserve the existing index endpoint and add a focused public test.
Migrate every service configuration from schema_version 1 to schema_version 2 without changing each service name. Verify that no service is missed.

Pin requests to version 2.31, set session.trust_env to False, and remove unsafe request defaults from every call site: never disable TLS verification and always use a finite positive timeout. Verify the change without installing dependencies.

Fix src/text_tools.py. normalize_username should trim leading and trailing whitespace, lowercase the username, collapse each internal whitespace run to one dash, and raise ValueError for blank input. Keep the public function name unchanged.

Fix src/invoice.py. invoice_total should multiply price by quantity, default missing quantity to 1, reject negative quantities with ValueError, apply tax_rate, and return a float rounded to two decimal places.
